description.en: The axolotl is a critically endangered paedomorphic salamander endemic to the lake complex of Xochimilco near Mexico City.
description.zh: 墨西哥钝口螈是一种极危的童态型蝾螈，特产于墨西哥城附近的霍奇米尔科湖区。

anatomy.en: The axolotl looks like a happy, underwater alien! It has a wide, cute face that looks like it's always smiling. On the sides of its head, it wears a fuzzy 'crown' of feathery gills that help it breathe. Because it never goes through metamorphosis like a regular frog or salamander, it stays looking like a baby forever.
anatomy.zh: 墨西哥钝口螈看起来像一个快乐的水下外星人！它有一张宽大、可爱的脸，看起来总是在微笑。在它的头两侧，戴着一顶毛茸茸的、羽毛状鳃组成的「王冠」，这能帮助它呼吸。因为它从不像普通的青蛙或蝾螈那样经历变态发育，所以它永远保持着婴儿般的样子。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Axolotls have an incredible, real-life superpower: regeneration! If an axolotl hurts or loses an arm, a leg, its tail, or even parts of its heart and brain, it can completely grow them back without a single scar. They walk slowly on the muddy lake bottom, sucking up worms and small fish like an underwater vacuum cleaner.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 墨西哥钝口螈拥有一种令人难以置信的现实生活中的超能力：再生！如果墨西哥钝口螈受伤或失去了一条胳膊、一条腿、尾巴，甚至心脏和大脑的一部分，它可以完全重新长出来，而且不留一点疤痕。它们在泥泞的湖底缓慢行走，像水下吸尘器一样吸食蠕虫和小鱼。

habitat_and_distribution.en: In the wild, these amazing creatures only exist in one single place on Earth: the ancient, murky canals of Lake Xochimilco in Mexico City. Sadly, pollution and the sprawling city have made them critically endangered in nature.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 在野外，这些神奇的生物只存在于地球上的一个地方：墨西哥城霍奇米尔科湖古老、浑浊的运河中。令人悲伤的是，污染和不断扩张的城市让它们在自然界中处于极度濒危的状态。

habitat.text_en: Lake Xochimilco canal network, Mexico City
habitat.text_zh: 墨西哥城霍奇米尔科湖运河网络
